name: Microware Group Limited
summary: Microware Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides information technology (IT) infrastructure solutions and IT managed services for the governments, educational institutions, public bodies, and commercial organizations in Hong Kong. The company offers servers, data storage, and networking equipment; and connectivity, app management, and automation solutions, as well as app and data protection solutions. It also provides email, network, and cloud security solutions, as well as client devices and secure access solutions to protect sensitive data, account information, intellectual property and network operations; and managed services, such as service desk, technical specialist, and onboarding services. In addition, it provides consultancy and advisory services; and engages in the management and maintenance of the IT infrastructure solutions, as well as cyber securities training programs. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong. Microware Group Limited is a subsidiary of Microware International Holdings Limited.
